title: ECB investigates Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson over nightclub incident
description: The England and Wales Cricket Board is looking into ‘a breach of team protocols’ over an incident in a nightclub in the early hours of Monday
content:
The England & Wales Cricket Board has launched an investigation into “a breach of team protocols” after Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson were involved in an unspecified incident in a London nightclub in the early hours of Monday.

title: iOS 27 Adds New Parental Controls: Ask to Browse, Time Allowances, and a Redesigned Screen Time
description: This fall, Apple will bring new child safety features to iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS Golden Gate. Apple says parents will have access to a simpler setup experience with recommended apps, a new Ask to Browse feature for Safari, and an overhauled Screen Time interface with Time Allowances. Parents will be able to select the apps a child can access, opting for a few essential apps, a curated set, or the apps that are appropriate for the individual child.

title: Earthquake rocks England camp ahead of World Cup friendly in Orlando
description: A 6.1 magnitude earthquake has been recorded in Orlando and across parts of central Florida
content:

title: NATO jets shoot down drone over Latvia, extending Ukraine spillover fears
description: The drone entered Latvian airspace due to ‘Russian electronic warfare’, the military says.
content:
NATO fighters have scrambled to shoot down a drone that entered Latvian airspace from Russia.
